summary: Phase 12: Client Experience Enhancement - All 4 features tested and working. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 12 features fully tested. All 4 new features working: (12A) Eligibility Checker with 4 visa programs scoring, (12B) EMI Plans with empty state for clients and admin-only creation, (12C) Family Members CRUD with all relationship types, (12D) Document Tracker showing 50% completion with per-step breakdown.

12A_eligibility_checker.details: Public and authenticated endpoints working. Returns 4 visa programs (Canada PR, Australia PR, Student Visa, Work Permit) with percentage scores, status badges, and improvement tips. Scoring logic correctly differentiates high vs low profiles. History saved for authenticated users.

12B_emi_plans.details: Client can view EMI plans (shows empty state when none exist). Admin-only creation enforced (403 for non-admin). Installment validation (3, 6, or 12 only). Schedule generation with due dates.

12C_family_members.details: Full CRUD operations working. All relationship types (spouse, child, parent, sibling) supported. Include in application checkbox functional. Edit and delete buttons working.

12D_document_tracker.details: Shows overall completion percentage (50% for test client). Per-step breakdown with required/uploaded counts. Document status chips (uploaded vs pending). 8 workflow steps displayed with progress bars.

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCK mode - logs to console instead of sending actual emails
